comment.body: the *biggest* problem with the AI bubble is it's massively misallocated capital and interfering with other things (consumer computing, heading into general electronics) - it's quite possible that a researcher (could easily be at home) who could figure out something revolutionary will not get the resources they could otherwise have had and now won't.  (say a large memory Mac Studio)
